fixture: 038_simple_casts

statement 1:
  sql:
    SELECT CAST('42' AS INTEGER)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 42

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT CAST(7 AS CHARACTER VARYING(3))
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] "7"

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT CAST(NULL AS INTEGER)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER
    rows:
      [0] NULL

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT CAST('abc' AS TEXT)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> TEXT NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] "abc"

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT CAST('5' AS BIGINT)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BIGINT NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 5
